code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if not inserted and x < v
          result = list.push(result, x)
          inserted = true
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut inter: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  match a.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    if list.contains(b, x)
      inter = insert_sorted(inter, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if inter.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < inter.len()
    match inter.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
